title: Abaxx Refutes Misinformation Being Circulated and Addresses Recent Share Price Decline
author: Abaxx Technologies Inc.
description: Abaxx Technologies (TSX:ABXX) issued a detailed response to allegations from Viceroy Research regarding wash trading, financial difficulties, and lack of proprietary technology. The company refuted claims of fraudulent market-making practices, clarified its actual cash burn rate, and explained the Cboe exit as a strategic adjustment. Despite recent positive developments including TSX listing and a $69 million financing round, the stock has declined to C$35.84. Abaxx scheduled an investor update call for June 18, 2026 to address shareholder concerns.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Cboe's exit from the strategic partnership is presented as a non-material event due to their strategic business changes and divestment of Canadian/Australian assets. The relationship ended amicably through a liquidity event, and Abaxx reacquired Cboe's position, which was disclosed in regulatory filings.

title: Small Caps Near Record Highs, Robinhood Rallies 12%: Stock Market Today
author: Piero Cingari
description: U.S. stocks traded higher midday Wednesday with semiconductor equipment names and small caps leading gains ahead of Fed Chair Kevin Warsh's first interest-rate decision. The Russell 2000 jumped 1.2% to a record high. Applied Materials surged 7% after Citi raised its price target, while Robinhood rallied 12.2% on strong trading volumes. Exchange operators fell sharply after Kalshi's Bitcoin futures approval raised competitive concerns.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Surged 7% after Citi raised price target to $710 from $550 and reiterated Buy rating, citing durable AI-driven demand for wafer-fab equipment
Jumped 12.2% after Deutsche Bank raised price target to $105 from $98, citing record June trading volumes and workforce optimization
Surged 13.3% on reports that OpenAI is evaluating capacity at the company's Project Matador AI power campus with potential for major commercial agreement
Dropped 5.8% after analysts flagged Kalshi's approval to offer Bitcoin perpetual futures as a competitive threat to incumbent venues
Fell 4.4% due to competitive concerns from Kalshi's Bitcoin futures approval affecting exchange operators
Dropped 7.6% as peer exchange operators were hammered by competitive threats from Kalshi's Bitcoin futures approval
Fell 7.0% despite beating earnings expectations, as profit slipped year-over-year from $1.38 to $1.31 adjusted EPS

title: SpaceX Options Frenzy Sparks Talk Of Gamma Squeeze To $400
author: Erica Kollmann
description: SpaceX (SPCX) options trading launched Tuesday with massive volume, sparking predictions of a potential gamma squeeze to $400. Analysts cite extreme conditions including a thin 3-5% tradable float, no established pricing history, and expected $22-27 billion in forced index buying. Despite being unprofitable with a $4.28 billion Q1 loss, demand remains sky-high with 500,000 contracts traded in the first hour. Options exchanges and retail brokers stand to benefit significantly from the activity.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock up 11.44% at launch with massive options volume and analyst predictions of potential price surge to $400. High demand and structural factors create bullish momentum despite fundamental unprofitability.
Benefits from hosting SPCX options trading; handles nearly 60% of options volume industry-wide and stands to gain significant revenue from the high-volume launch.
Co-hosts SPCX options trading and will benefit from expected $22-27 billion in forced index buying as SPCX enters Nasdaq-100 tracker funds.
Options trading represents roughly 25% of total revenue; positioned to benefit significantly from SPCX options volume and retail call-buying activity.
Mentioned as comparison point for potential SPCX options volume and as part of AI sector dynamics, but no direct impact from SPCX launch.
Referenced as benchmark for options trading volume comparison, but no direct impact from SPCX launch.

title: Dow Jones Hit Record Highs As Oil Drops To $77: Stock Market Today
author: Piero Cingari
description: U.S. stocks showed mixed performance on Tuesday as investors rotated out of technology into financials, utilities, and industrials. The Dow Jones reached record highs at 52,185.49, while the Nasdaq 100 declined 1.4%. Oil prices fell to $77/barrel on expectations of a Strait of Hormuz reopening deal. Federal Reserve Chair Kevin Warsh prepares for his first policy meeting with markets pricing in a 97% probability of unchanged rates.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: Stock jumped 7.2% after closing a $2.55 billion acquisition of three Western PJM gas plants that is immediately accretive and adds over 15% to cash flow per share
Gained 7.0% following Monday's 16% rally, continuing upward momentum
Climbed 7.3% after announcing organizational revamp to prepare for multiple product launches in 2027-2028 and closely watched melanoma vaccine trial readout
Slid 6.2% as competitors launched high-profile SpaceX equity options across rival exchanges, stoking fears of lost market share
Cratered 17.9% after announcing all-stock merger with Olin Corp; investors greeted deal with skepticism due to exposure to soft, cyclical end-markets
Dropped 7.5% following announcement of all-stock merger with Huntsman; investor skepticism due to cyclical market exposure
Up 1.6% as banks rallied ahead of Federal Reserve decision
Added 1.3% as defensive sector benefited from market rotation
Down 1.7% as megacap and chip names retreated after Monday's rally
Slipped 0.7% in sympathy with crude oil decline to $77/barrel

title: Cboe Global Markets Declares Second-Quarter 2026 Dividend
author: Prnewswire
description: Cboe Global Markets announced its Board of Directors has declared a quarterly cash dividend of $0.72 per share for Q2 2026, payable on June 15, 2026, to stockholders of record as of May 29, 2026.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The company's declaration of a consistent quarterly dividend of $0.72 per share demonstrates financial strength and commitment to returning capital to shareholders, indicating stable profitability and confidence in future cash flows.
